sales.title:
Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 40299 — ANONYMOUS ISSUES. Time of Basil II & Constantine VIII, 976-1025. AE Follis (11.82 gms), Constantinople Mint. NGC MS, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 4/5.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, c
sales.description:
ANONYMOUS ISSUES. Time of Basil II & Constantine VIII, 976-1025. AE Follis (11.82 gms), Constantinople Mint. NGC MS, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 4/5.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1813. Obverse: Facing bust of Christ Pantokrator; Reverse: Legend in four lines. Conditionally about as impressive as one could ever hope for, this stunning Mint State example offers bold and powerful strike quality, rich unblighted surfaces, and a deep color, with a few green hints....
